title: Norwegian Salmon Skewers with Toasted Balsamic Glaze
description: A healthy and flavorful salmon skewer recipe with toasted balsamic glaze, perfect for a light dinner or lunch.
instructions: 2. Cut the salmon fillets into 1-inch cubes.
3. Thread the salmon cubes onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
4. Brush the olive oil onto the salmon skewers and season with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
6. Meanwhile, toast the balsamic vinegar and honey in a saucepan over medium heat until caramelized.
7. Brush the toasted balsamic glaze onto the grilled salmon skewers.
8. Serve the skewers on top of toasted bread, garnished with chopped parsley.
